I varied all CFFs between -1k to 1k and computed loss for each of them. (also checked by varying from -10k to 10k and -500 to 500)
For each CFF pair, I then filtered the min and max ranges that would give the MSE loss as at most 0.1. 
I did that for all 28 pairs and grouped by CFFs.
From all these ranges, I pick the broadest ones, and round them up by a little, to get the final exploration ranges:

Re(H): -30 to 30
Re(Ht): -30 to 30
Re(E): -100 to 100
Re(Et): -400 to 400
Im(H): -20 to 20
Im(Ht): -30 to 30
Im(E): -100 to 100
Im(Et): -400 to 400

*** Here's the results for the ranges of all groups:

Re(H): -10.010009765625 to 3.00299072265625
Re(H): -8.00799560546875 to 2.00201416015625
Re(H): -9.009033203125 to 3.00299072265625
